description.value: Aura faint abjuration; CL 5th; Slot ring; Price 2,000 gp (+1), 8,000 gp (+2), 18,000 gp (+3), 32,000 gp (+4), 50,000 gp (+5); Weight â DESCRIPTION This ring offers continual magical protection in the form of a deflection bonus of +1 to +5 to AC.
